content.stem: Sharp is to dull as hot is to ___
content.explanation: This analogy shows opposite relationships. Sharp and dull are complete opposites on the sharpness scale, just as hot and cold are complete opposites on the temperature scale.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student thinks warm is opposite to hot rather than understanding the complete opposition relationship
Student chooses a moderate opposite rather than the complete opposite that matches the sharp-dull relationship
Student thinks freezing matches because both hot and freezing are extreme, missing the direct opposition
